feed.title: BIP-110 update: v0.4.1 release and implementation submitted to Bitcoin Core

entry.title: BIP-110 update: v0.4.1 release and implementation submitted to Bitcoin Core
entry.summary: As you delve into the code, your appreciation for the contributions made by @dathonohm is evident. This acknowledgment highlights an ongoing collaboration or mentorship that plays a significant role in your programming project. Your engagement with the code suggests that you are actively working on understanding or improving it, indicating a phase of development or review in your work process. Such interactions are crucial for knowledge exchange and project advancement within the programming community.
